title: Telecoming: How To Save Up to 70% Using Fargate Spot on a Test Automation Platform (Spanish)

description:
Telecoming build technology components to monetize digital services, managing more than 7,000M transactions per year in 27 countries. At that scale, they had to develop Aquarius to automatize content platforms tests. They did it with a serverless approach to forget about having to manage infrastructure and after discuss with Enterprise Support, which helps them achieve their outcomes and find success in the cloud, they were recommended to use Fargate Spot for having a auto-scaling solution with 70% savings versus the previous version of the platform.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture
